Name: Blue Star Irregulars
Details: The Blue Star Irregulars were originally nearly all the SLDF recipients of the Blue Star of Kerensky SDLF medal, who chose to stay in the Inner Sphere and enter the service of the Federated Suns as mercenaries during the First Succession War. The Irregulars presently consist of three mercenary regiments, the 1894th Light Horse, the Avatars of Painful Death and the 21st Rim Worlds.
